summary: This Quality Management System document outlines formative usability evaluations conducted on an AI-driven phone system. It details feedback gathered from healthcare professionals across the UK, Spain, Chile, and Germany regarding interface design, clinical workflow integration, and prompt clarity. The report highlights specific UI refinements made to support elderly care and reduce administrative burden for GP practices.
